reason: Write-enabled Codex review (gpt-5.5, xhigh) launched and ran a full independent pass over all three deliverables with write access, and DID apply substantive, correct edits in place this run (tightened the xi_p>0 proof via KL minimization + attained projection + closedness; added do-calculus modularity/no-confounder assumptions; corrected the non-Gaussian robustness claim to require an assumed positive residual-variance gap rather than deriving it from distributional ANM identifiability; faithful consistency-theorem conditions A1-A4/B1-B4 and the o(xi_p) rate; code: ddof=1, semgam_score=-log(var(resid)), maxNumParents=min(p-1,round(n/20)), PNS 2%/>=3-of-100, reachability cycle guard). These edits were re-verified by the agent against the retrieved primary paper, the Peters et al. 2014 ANM source, and the canonical CAM R package. However the specific job thread got tangled cleaning up multiple concurrent CAM companion processes on this shared machine and did not cleanly finalize / emit a tidy final changelog, so a clean 'completed' pass cannot be honestly asserted. Marked failed to keep the gate visible; the deliverables themselves were manually re-derived and verified equation-by-equation.
